titles: Computer Science with Cyber Security Specialization
majors.notes: explicit official page sentence; titles extracted from official page: https://www.smu.edu/admission/majors-minors

admissions.testing_policy: SMU is fully test-optional; applicants who do not submit ACT or SAT scores are evaluated on other factors including grades, résumé, essays, and recommendation letters.
admissions.gpa_policy: No explicit minimum GPA was found on the cited official pages used in this auto-enrichment pass.

evidence.source_excerpt: SMU’s strength lies in fusing teaching and research into breakthrough academic experiences. This balance is rare among national institutions, yet fitting for a university like SMU that values balance and breadth in education. With more than 100 majors and 85 minors to choose from, as well as double and triple major opportunities and accelerated degree programs, you can go as far as you want and as quickly, too.

evidence.claim: You’ll be transformed by the knowledge and experiences gained through the Embrey Human Rights Program, whose mission is to educate students and other members of the global community to understand, promote and defend human rights as responsible citizens of the world. You’ll have many opportunities to learn, travel and act for human rights as a student at SMU, the first university in the South, and only the fifth in the country, to offer an undergraduate major in human rights.

evidence.claim: Ranked top 5 professors from RateMyProfessors by rating count and sentiment metrics.
evidence.source_excerpt: Matched RateMyProfessors school 'SMU - Southern Methodist University' (legacyId=927) and ranked all professors with at least one rating.

evidence.claim: Ranked top 10 notable alumni from Wikipedia-derived candidate lists using trailing pageviews.
evidence.source_excerpt: Candidates were harvested from school-specific Wikipedia alumni/people pages or categories, filtered to likely people, then ranked by pageviews.

warnings: Major titles extracted from official school source (30 titles).
Phase 5 auto-enrichment completed using official-school web crawl heuristics; manual spot-checking is still recommended for edge cases.
GPA policy was normalized from absence of an explicit minimum-GPA statement on the cited official pages.
admissions.course_rigor was reset to unknown during manual cleanup because the earlier auto-extracted text was unrelated to the requested admissions field.
SMU testing policy was manually repaired from the official undergraduate admission testing page after the auto-crawl captured unrelated program-marketing text.
School-people enrichment uses public third-party sources (RateMyProfessors and Wikipedia/Wikimedia), so rankings are heuristic rather than official university data.

popular_professors.ranking_basis: RateMyProfessors entries sorted by rating_count desc, then average_rating desc, then would_take_again_percent desc.
popular_professors.source_summary: Matched RateMyProfessors school 'SMU - Southern Methodist University' (legacyId=927) and ranked all professors with at least one rating.

successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Wikipedia list/category candidates ranked by trailing-365-day Wikipedia pageviews.
successful_alumni.source_summary: Candidates were harvested from school-specific Wikipedia alumni/people pages or categories, filtered to likely people, then ranked by pageviews.
